package.name: delivery_navigation
package.description: High-level navigation logic for the campus delivery robot. Wraps the standard move_base stack with a DeliveryMission action server that team mates can drive from the CLI, the mission node, or RViz. Owner: Member 4. Contains two ROS nodes: - waypoint_action_server_node : implements DeliveryMission action on top of move_base. - global_planner_helper_node : monitors planning status and republishes a simplified "path summary" topic for the CLI.
